---
title: "Teaching"
---

I focus on clear intuition, applied examples, and supportive problem-solving sessions.

## Teaching Experience

::: {.timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
**LSE** - TA, Econometrics (UG), 2024-2025  
Tutorials, office hours, and exam preparation support.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**University of Toronto** - TA, Microeconomics, 2022-2023  
Tutorial support, problem-set guidance, and review sessions.
:::
:::

## Materials

Public teaching materials will be posted here as they become available.
